plugins.name: @dune/plugin-analytics
plugins.label: Analytics
plugins.description: Privacy-respecting page view tracking with a built-in admin dashboard. No external services, no cookies — all data stays on your server.
plugins.author: Dune Team

plugins.name: @dune/plugin-sitemap-advanced
plugins.label: Advanced Sitemap
plugins.description: Granular sitemap control: per-page changefreq and priority, multi-sitemap index, image sitemaps, and automatic sitemap ping to search engines.
plugins.author: Dune Team

plugins.name: @dune/plugin-social-cards
plugins.label: Social Cards
plugins.description: Auto-generate Open Graph and Twitter card images for every page. Configurable templates, custom fonts, and per-page overrides via frontmatter.
plugins.author: Dune Team

plugins.name: @dune/plugin-redirects
plugins.label: Redirects Manager
plugins.description: Manage URL redirects from the admin panel. Supports 301/302 redirects, wildcard patterns, and bulk import from CSV.
plugins.author: Dune Team

plugins.name: @dune/plugin-newsletter
plugins.label: Newsletter
plugins.description: Subscriber capture, list management, and campaign sending. Integrates with Mailchimp, Resend, and Postmark. Opt-in forms via shortcode or page-builder section.
plugins.author: Dune Team

plugins.name: @dune/plugin-full-text-search-meilisearch
plugins.label: Meilisearch
plugins.description: Drop-in replacement for the built-in search engine that uses Meilisearch for fast, typo-tolerant full-text search with faceted filtering.
plugins.author: Dune Team

plugins.name: @dune/plugin-code-highlight
plugins.label: Code Highlight
plugins.description: Syntax highlighting for code blocks via Shiki. Supports 100+ languages and all VS Code themes. Zero client-side JavaScript.
plugins.author: Dune Team

plugins.name: @dune/plugin-table-of-contents
plugins.label: Table of Contents
plugins.description: Auto-generate a table of contents from page headings. Configurable depth, sticky sidebar variant, and smooth scroll.
plugins.author: Dune Team

plugins.name: @dune/plugin-related-posts
plugins.label: Related Posts
plugins.description: Show related content recommendations based on shared taxonomy or full-text similarity. Configurable count and display style.
plugins.author: Dune Team

plugins.name: @community/dune-plugin-umami
plugins.label: Umami Analytics
plugins.description: Inject the Umami analytics tracking script into all pages. Configurable script URL and website ID.
plugins.author: Community
